name: Holo ID Roommates
description:
Just made a bot of the roommate scenario but with the 9 members of Holo ID, it's a bit of a crutch of a scenario but it's an enjoyable one. Let me know how well the bot works if you want, aside from the bot talking for you as I have no idea how to fix that. Also I haven't tested this yet so sorry if it's not the best

Update: Adding a buncha new intros so have fun with em
Update 2: Adding some gens cause I wanna
